title: Intensely Caramel Slovakian Pork Dumplings
description: Charred, pillowy Slovakian dish featuring caramel and steam, served in agave leaves for a unique experience, this diabetic-friendly recipe is an adventurous twist on traditional dumplings.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine ground pork, caramel sauce, chopped onion, minced garlic, ground caraway seeds, salt, and black pepper, mixing well with your hands until just combined.
Lay an agave leaf flat and place a tablespoon of the pork mixture in the center of the leaf.
Fold the leaf over the filling to form a triangle or a square shape, and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Repeat with the remaining pork mixture and agave leaves.
Place the dumplings in a large steamer basket, leaving some space between each dumpling.
Steam the dumplings over boiling water for 10 minutes, then remove from heat and let cool for a few minutes.
Char the dumplings under the preheated oven broiler for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until lightly browned.
Serve the dumplings hot, garnished with additional caramel sauce if desired.
